headline: Buy the dip or wait? How pros are investing now
summary: Brian Levitt, Chief Global Market Strategist at Invesco reveals which pullbacks are worth buying now and why cyclical sectors, mid‑caps, and non‑U.S. markets may lead the next move higher.
